data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — test-fix-bug-context-detection.sh shows TOLERATED (4 pass, 2 red-zone) in hook suite run. RED zone tolerance infrastructure updated: run-hook-tests.sh sets SUITE_TEST_INDEX, suite-engine.sh adds suffix path matching. Pre-existing hook failures (review-complexity-classifier, pre-commit-test-gate) are unrelated to this task.
